name: Elijah Wilkins
researcher_question: Using Kentucky death certificates, what were the date and place of death of Elijah Wilkins of Kentucky, and what information in the certificate confirms his identity?
notes: Death record indexed under name variants (Eligie/Elizah/Eligah); several other Wilkins relatives in the same tree share similar names/places, so identity confirmation (spouse Sally/K2BS-YMD, parents James/Margaret) matters for disambiguation. Recalibrated 2026-07-14 after the first live validation run: no Kentucky death certificate exists for Elijah (statewide registration began 1911; he died ~1875) and the exact 30 Nov 1875 date lives only in an Ancestry-only index unreachable via FamilySearch tools — f1 accepts a bounded probate-derived conclusion (Muhlenberg County, mid-to-late 1870s, bounded by the 1881 settlement / Dec 1885 administrator's bond), and f2 accepts any sound identity mechanism including the administrator-son Jesse Wilkins linkage. See README 'Recalibration'.
